title: Vežba 97

questions.text:
Nekoliko dana nakon razgovora sa Annom, Brian je poslao ovaj e-mail timu:

Email subject: Cybersecurity Training Session

Dear Team,

I want to update you on our next cybersecurity training session.

Details:

- Topic: Password Security and Phishing

- Date: August 15, 2024

- Time: 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM

- Location: Google Meet

Why Attend?

As you know, our company has recently faced some security threats. We're adding a section on phishing, using real-life scenarios to ensure everyone uses strong passwords and protects our data.

Attendance:

Attendance is mandatory. If you can't attend, please inform your manager.

Looking forward to seeing you all.

Best regards,

Brian

Koji novi deo se dodaje u obuku?

answers.feedback: E-mail se ne tiče kulture niti vrednosti kompanije.

answers.answer: Sekcija o korišćenju alata za upravljanje projektima.
answers.feedback: Nema spominjanja alata za upravljanje projektima u mejlu.
Zamislite da e-mail spominje nešto o sastancima ili se tiče bezbednosti mreže.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.
explanation: E-mail kaže, We're adding a section on phishing, using real-life scenarios. Ovo ukazuje da nova funkcija cilja na detekciju pokušaja sajberske prevare, a ne zakazivanje sastanaka.
